markdown:
# Scroll of Titan Summoning (Colossus)

When you take a [[magic]] action to read this scroll, a Colossus appears in an unoccupied space on the ground or in water that you can see within 1 mile of yourself.

The Colossus is [[hostile_attitude|Hostile]] toward all other creatures and disappears when it drops to 0 [[hit_points]]. If the Colossus is summoned into a space that isn't large enough to contain it, the summoning fails, and the scroll is wasted.
